description: Name matcher (table-driven): case/punctuation/whitespace/suffix folding produces exact matches only on normalized equality; near-miss cases land as suggestions; unrelated names produce nothing.
getQboCustomers: realm scoping, cache behavior, EE/permission gates (mirrors existing catalog action tests).
Customers tab contract: rows render mapping state; link writes a realm-scoped mapping; create-in-QBO calls the company adapter and writes the mapping; leave writes nothing.
Bulk accept links exactly the exact-match set; fuzzy suggestions are not included in bulk accept.
Exporter customer resolution prefers an existing client mapping over display-name auto-provision.
Invoice candidate matcher: doc number + total + customer agreement → confident; number collision or total mismatch → review list; no candidates → empty result without error.
Bulk link writes mapping rows with snapshot and exports nothing; linked invoices are excluded from subsequent export selection (excludeSyncedInvoices path).
Payment backfill: applies historical payments via recordExternalPayment per linked invoice; skips invoices already paid; partial histories yield partially_applied; re-run applies nothing new.
Go-live cutoff: finalize before auto_sync_start_date does not enqueue; on/after does; unset setting defaults to connect-day behavior.
Wizard gating: shows after first connect without a completion record; not after completion; re-run from settings re-enters with idempotent steps.

DB-backed integration: seeded Alga tenant + mocked QBO file (customers, invoices, payments) → wizard run links customers + invoices, backfills payments, sets cutoff; next cycle exports only a newly finalized invoice.
Sandbox with pre-seeded customers/invoices/payments: wizard bulk-links exact customers, fuzzy review works, history links without export, paid states land correctly.
Sandbox: after wizard, finalize a new invoice → only it exports; re-export of a linked historical invoice updates (not duplicates) the QBO document.
Sandbox: re-run the wizard → no duplicate mappings, payments, or exports; settings shows last-run state.
Sandbox: create-in-QBO-now provisions the customer immediately and first export uses it (no display-name duplicate).
